title: Cobblemon - AnotherRecipePack
description: Additional crafting recipes for Cobblemon. Made for the Camp Cobblemon server.
body:
Another pack adding some recipes for items in Cobblemon.

This pack adds recipes for the following:
- Ability Capsule and Patch
- Type Gems
- EV feathers
- Throat Spray
- Eject Pack

All of the recipes can be found in the gallery and have been balanced with the base mod in mind.
